subcodes.first_line: O divine friends and O dawning-places of the lights of mystic knowledge of the Beauty of the All-Merciful! At all times, at the threshold of His Presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان الهی و ای مطالع انوار عرفان جمال رحمانی در جمیع اوقات بدرگاه حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
